SRC:zalando_key_figures_2024.title: Zalando: Key figures 2024 | Zalando Corporate
SRC:zalando_key_figures_2024.quote: GMV 15,296.2m EUR; Revenue 10,572.5m EUR; Active customers 51.8m; Average number of employees 15,309

SRC:zalando_fy25_results_press_release.title: Zalando delivers strong 2025 results, expects further acceleration in 2026 — EQS via WebDisclosure
SRC:zalando_fy25_results_press_release.quote: Group GMV 17,560.2m EUR (+14.7%); Group revenue 12,346.1m EUR (+16.8%); Adjusted EBIT 590.7m EUR; Active customers 62 million; Founded in Berlin in 2008; connecting 62 million active customers with more than 7,000 brands across 29 markets

SRC:zalando_management_board.title: Zalando: Our Management Board | Zalando Corporate
SRC:zalando_management_board.quote: Robert Gentz — Co-founder and co-CEO; David Schröder — Co-CEO; Anna Dimitrova — CFO (joined January 2026); David Schneider — Co-founder, Management Board member; Dr. Astrid Arndt — Chief People Officer, Corporate Functions

SRC:zalando_corporate_culture.title: Zalando: Our corporate culture | Zalando Corporate
SRC:zalando_corporate_culture.quote: At Zalando, our purpose of reimagining fashion for the good of all drives us to make the fashion world smarter, friendlier, and more open.

SRC:zalando_ipo_techcrunch_2014.title: Zappos-Style Fashion Portal Zalando To File For $657M IPO In Frankfurt In 2014 — TechCrunch
SRC:zalando_ipo_techcrunch_2014.quote: Between 2010 and today Kinnevik has invested 5.5 Swedish kronor ($784 million) in Zalando for a 37% stake in the company

SRC:zalando_funding_tracxn.title: Zalando — 2026 Funding Rounds & List of Investors | Tracxn
SRC:zalando_funding_tracxn.quote: Zalando has raised a total of $191M over 9 rounds. Zalando's largest funding round was a Series C round held on Oct 02, 2013 for $191M.

SRC:zalando_ipo_wellfound.title: Zalando SE Funding Rounds, Valuation & Investors — Wellfound

SRC:zalando_eu_greenwashing_reuters.title: Zalando to overhaul sustainability claims, European Commission says — Reuters
SRC:zalando_eu_greenwashing_reuters.quote: Zalando has committed to overhaul by mid-April the sustainability claims it makes on its websites after the EU qualified them as 'misleading'

SRC:zalando_dsa_reuters.title: Zalando turns to EU top court in fight over online content rules — Reuters
SRC:zalando_dsa_reuters.quote: Zalando took its fight against EU online content rules to Europe's highest court, saying that a lower tribunal had erred in throwing out its challenge

SRC:fashionunited_fy24_results.title: Zalando more than triples annual profit in 2024 — FashionUnited
SRC:fashionunited_fy24_results.quote: Zalando generated revenue of 10.6 billion euros in 2024, marking a 4.2 percent increase from the previous year. GMV grew by 4.5 percent to 15.3 billion euros.

SRC:zalando_q3_2025_results.title: Zalando delivers strong Q3 growth with customer base surpassing 61 million — Zalando Corporate
SRC:zalando_q3_2025_results.quote: Active customers surpass 61 million; confirmed full-year 2025 guidance with expected pro-forma GMV and revenue growth of 4% to 7%

SRC:trustpilot_zalando_uk.title: www.zalando.co.uk Reviews — Trustpilot UK
SRC:trustpilot_zalando_uk.quote: TrustScore 2.0/5 based on 5,138 reviews — 55% 5-star, 35% 1-star, 4% 2-star, 2% 3-star, 4% 4-star. Most recent reviews cite Evri courier failures, refund refusals, and unresponsive customer service.

SRC:play_store_zalando.title: Zalando — online fashion store — Google Play
SRC:play_store_zalando.quote: 4.4 stars, 1.27M reviews. Recent reviews cite delivery failures (SEUR courier), order cancellations, and incompetent customer service, alongside positive reviews praising pricing and product quality.
